name: buzzassist
description: BuzzAssist canvas and media plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use the BuzzAssist canvas and media generation plugin from Codex.
interface.longDescription: BuzzAssist is a Codex plugin that bundles a project-local Excalidraw canvas, MCP-backed plugin tools, and an optional token-protected local HTTP MCP endpoint discovered through canvas/.server.json. Open the local canvas URL in Codex's in-app browser for desktop work. Tool calls update the same browser canvas and can draw diagrams, read selections, insert assets, and run image, video, subtitle, and silence-cut workflows. For phone access to the exact same canvas UI, the plugin can start a Cloudflare Canvas Tunnel by default, with ngrok available as an optional provider.
defaultPrompt: Open the BuzzAssist local canvas URL for this project in the in-app browser.
Use read_me and create_view to draw into the live BuzzAssist canvas.
Generate a new image into the selected Excalidraw AI holder.
